description: Address semantic review findings: XSS sanitization in content-generator.ts, move cheerio to devDependencies, rename misleading fetchFillerDataFromGitHub function.
steps: Add an escapeHtml() helper to content-generator.ts and apply it to all user-provided data interpolated into HTML templates (title, description, genre names).
Move cheerio from dependencies to devDependencies in package.json.
Rename fetchFillerDataFromGitHub to getAllFillerData (or remove it in favor of existing getAllFillerData). Update all import sites.
acceptance_criteria: All user-provided data in content-generator.ts is escaped before HTML interpolation
cheerio is listed under devDependencies, not dependencies
No references to fetchFillerDataFromGitHub remain in the codebase
